There was no hidden 24-foot bulge of water. The surface was flat to the precision of my instruments.

Instead, it has been met with a parade of excuses: “refraction,” “atmospheric lensing,” “temperature inversion.” Notice how every failure of the globe prediction is instantly rescued by an invisible, unmeasurable effect that conveniently appears only when the globe is threatened. When the same instruments are used to survey a railway or a canal, those same atmospheric effects are never invoked. Only when the sacred curve is missing does “refraction” become an all-purpose savior.

If the Earth were truly a globe, the horizontal plane of large bodies of water would have to conform to a convex surface. It does not. It remains flat, exactly as our senses and our instruments report.

Ships do not “hull-down” because they are following the curve; they disappear gradually due to perspective and the limits of angular resolution. On a globe 25,000 miles in circumference, the horizon should drop away so rapidly that an observer at sea level could see only about three miles before the curve hides everything beyond. Yet from modest elevations we routinely see lighthouses, mountains, and coastlines at distances that defy the calculated curvature drop. The geometric horizon is simply not where the textbooks claim it must be.

Third, the Sun and Moon. Both appear as disks of equal size—roughly 32 arcminutes—yet we are told one is 93 million miles away and the other a mere 238,000. Their apparent motion is consistent with small, local luminaries circling above a flat plane. The Sun’s rays passing through cloud gaps (crepuscular rays) converge to a point above the clouds, not from an object millions of miles distant. Time-lapse photography of the Moon shows it rotating in a manner impossible for a spherical body tidally locked to a spherical Earth. These are not interpretations; they are photographs anyone can take.

Fourth, Antarctic reality. The globe model requires Antarctica to be a small continent pinned at the bottom of a ball. In truth, it forms an encircling ice wall that contains the oceans. Every serious expedition that has attempted to traverse or circumnavigate it has either been stopped by treaty authorities or has returned with distances and travel times that match a circumferential boundary thousands of miles longer than a globe permits. The 60th parallel south is heavily restricted precisely because it would expose the geometry we are not meant to examine.

The spherical model is not a scientific conclusion; it is an inherited dogma protected by layers of auxiliary hypotheses, institutional authority, and the quiet threat of ridicule. It requires us to believe that our senses are lying, that water curves uphill, that rockets disappear into the void only to beam back perfect CGI, and that every airline pilot, sailor, and surveyor is either ignorant or complicit in a conspiracy spanning centuries and rival nations.

I reject that counsel of despair.

I stand instead with the evidence of direct observation, repeatable experiment, and plain common sense. The Earth is flat, motionless, and enclosed. The heavens revolve above us. The Sun and Moon are lights within our reach. And the grand edifice of modern cosmology—built on dark matter, dark energy, and an expanding universe that no one can touch—is nothing more than a modern mythology dressed in mathematics.

The Bedford Level still lies there, quiet and level, waiting for any honest inquirer who values what his own eyes report over what his teachers demand he believe. Go look for yourself. The water is flat. The Earth is flat. Truth is simple once the fear of being called foolish is set aside.

The choice is yours: trust the inherited model that requires you to deny your senses, or trust the experiment you can perform yourself on a clear, still morning on the Old Bedford River.

I have performed it. I have seen the result. The Earth is an extended plane.

So say I, and so the evidence declares.

— Dr. Samuel Rowbotham II, Natural Philosopher

The Earth is an oblate spheroid (approximately spherical), and this has been established through centuries of consistent, reproducible evidence from multiple independent fields:

- **Direct observation**: Photos and video from space (satellites, the ISS, high-altitude balloons, commercial spacecraft) show a curved horizon and a round planet. Astronauts from many nations have seen it.

- **Exploration and mapping**: Circumnavigation (including polar routes), seismology, and gravimetry produce data consistent only with a roughly spherical body. A flat Earth with an "ice wall" or dome has never yielded a working, predictive map or model that matches real-world navigation, flight times, or celestial observations.

Flat Earth arguments typically rely on selective interpretation of visuals (e.g., "the horizon looks flat"), conspiracy claims about global institutions, or misapplied optics/perspective. These have been repeatedly debunked by straightforward experiments anyone can perform (e.g., measuring shadow angles at multiple latitudes simultaneously, tracking star trails from different hemispheres, or using a theodolite over long distances).
